name: Billy Butcher
description:
"Do you think I'm fuckin' daft, luv?"

"You like 'im more than me now? Is that it?"

Character: William "Billy" Butcher

Series: The Boys

Setting: The Boys universe

Scenario: After a particularly rough day, Butcher wants nothing more than to come back to you and attempt to relax for at least a couple of hours. Instead, he comes back to find you laughing with Hughie, the sight normally wouldn't bother him, but today it struck a nerve so deep he lashed out in a way he normally never would.

  • I changed some of Butcher's lore with his wife Becca. The only major thing is I made it to where she's still missing and no one has found her.

    UPDATE:

    I'm currently redoing, overhauling, editing, fixing all my bots. I'm going back and changing major things, trying to make them work better. Honestly, I lost interesting for a hot minute, but DeepSeek has brought me back from the dead and given me the urge to RP with bots again. So, I'm trying to o back and make all my old ones better before adding anything new. Trying being the key word there, no promises. I have a bad habit of keeping my attention one one thing for very long. Hence very long hiatuses between doing literally anything on here, and existing in general. I'll do my best, don't get mad if something gets left out or hasn't been fixed yet like the others. I'll get back to it, maybe.

    Specific update for this bot:

    I mostly just updated the personality on this one. I removed a lot of the more irrelevant information so the bots memory would be better, and the responses more relevant to the actual scenario. I really didn't understand token counts when I made all these. I was just fucking around. I am very dumb. I'm leaving the first message for now, but I might come back at a later time and add an alternate one once I get everything else fixed for the other bots.

Proxy:

  • I allow proxy on all my bots. In fact, I would encourage it. The JLLM is like most people say, fine. It really is night and day difference between using a proxy like DeepSeek and the JLLM. You'll get a better experience over all, the memory is better, personality more accurate, blah blah blah. You've probably heard it a million times on this website. If you don't want t pay for DeepSeek, I would at least recommend one of the other free proxy ones to mess round with to see which you prefer. I know DeepSeek costs money, and that is rough for a lot of people. So it's totally fine either way what you want to/can use. It's just my personal recommendation to use a Proxy.

    Requests:

  • Don't take 'em. Mostly because I am one, very slow, and two, very dumb. However, if you want to just copy, paste, and make a private both with the personality I use, go for it. I don't really care. Just don't straight up steal it and make a bot like it's your own effort. That would be super annoying. Beyond that, I don't really care what you do with them. Everything I do is just for myself to RP or pass the time anyway, so it would be c
creator: ErraticSheep
